HGSS.511.0000:
Who are you?\f
My name’s Blue.
I was once the Kanto Champion.\f
Although it was short-lived thanks
to Red...\r
Anyway, take a good look around you...\f
HGSS.511.0001:
Blue: A volcano erupts, and just
like that, a whole town disappears.\f
We can go on winning and losing in
Pokémon, but if nature so much as\r
twitches, we can be overwhelmed\r
in a second...\f
That’s the way it is...
But, anyway, I’m still a Trainer.\f
If I see a strong opponent, it makes me
want to battle.\f
HGSS.511.0002:
If you want to battle me...for real,
come to the Viridian Gym.\f
HGSS.511.0004:
If you want to battle me...for real,
show me how many Kanto Badges\r
you’ve got.\f
...
[0132,0000,0000]...\f
You’re not ready to battle me...
HGSS.511.0005:
Blue: You are quite something!
You defeated Red!?\r
That’s great!\f
Let’s take a picture together! [0200,0000]
HGSS.511.0007: Blue: Thanks for the nice picture!
HGSS.511.0009:
Your Photo Album is full.\f
Access your PC and delete
some pictures.
HGSS.511.0010:
Blaine: I’ll never give up until the 
day I’ve rebuilt the Cinnabar Gym!\f
Why not exchange numbers! [0200,0000]
HGSS.511.0012:
Blaine: Hmmm...
We should be able to battle\r
on Tuesday evenings!
HGSS.511.0014:
Blaine: Do we want to exchange
numbers? [0200,0000]
HGSS.511.0015:
Blaine: Oh, it is you!
Say, do you want to take a picture\r
with me right here? [0200,0000]
HGSS.511.0016: Blaine: There, stand next to me!\f
HGSS.511.0017: Blaine: Oh, this is a good picture!
HGSS.511.0019:
Your Photo Album is full.\f
Access your PC to delete
some pictures.
HGSS.511.0020:
There is a notice here...\f
The Cinnabar Gym has relocated
to Seafoam Islands.\r
           Blaine
HGSS.511.0021:
Cinnabar Island
The Ravaged Town of the Past
